'''Debbikin''' '''''the Young''''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of one of the [[Cestus Cybernetics]] Families and the son of [[Debbikin the Elder]].

==Biography==
The Families of Cestus Cybernetics aspired to overthrow the Regent [[G'Mai Duris]] from the government. The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Vippit]] [[Doolb Snoil]] managed to make the Regent give up trusting the Families. Then, [[Caiza Quill]], [[Por'Ten (Lord)|Lord]] and [[Por'Ten (Lady)|Lady Por'Ten]], and Debbikin the Young caught the magcar to move through the subterranean tunnels. During the journey, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] pretended to be a [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] envoy, and he held back the four leaders to make a negotiation. Then, they were liberated by Kenobi, with a perfect performance. These fact made [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] change its position in favor of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. But Quill received a hologram where was revealed the Jedi sham. So, Regent Duris had to depend on the Cestus Cybernetics again. Then, the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]], allied with [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], used the [[JK-13 security droid]]s against the [[Desert Wind]]. When the conflict was acquiring importance the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] decided to send the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic Cruiser]] [[Nexu/Legends|''Nexu'']]. When the ship achieved the orbit of Ord Cestus, the Five Families, including Debbikin the Young, took refuge in a secret bunker, that finally was discovered by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Jangotat]]. Jangotat went on search of the leaders of Cestus Cybernetics but got trapped next to the bunker. He eventually sent a code ordering the Nexu to bomb over him which killed everyone inside the bunker.
